steps: Go to https://app.frontapp.com/settings/tools/api and log in to your Front account
You will land on the 'API Tokens' tab under Settings > Developers
Enter a descriptive name for the token (e.g., 'Gateway MCP')
Select the required namespaces and permissions (e.g., conversations:read, messages:write)
On the token detail page, click 'Reveal' or 'Copy' to obtain the token value
Use the token as a Bearer token in the Authorization header

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: A Front API token created in Settings > Developers > API Tokens. Used as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

notes: Front API tokens are long-lived JWTs — store them securely
Tokens are scoped by namespace and permission — create separate tokens per integration for least privilege
The API base URL is https://api2.frontapp.com
Front offers a free developer account at https://dev.frontapp.com for testing
Rate limit is 120 requests per minute per token by default
Company-level tokens can be created by admins; personal tokens are user-scoped

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve the identity of the token owner (teammate or company account)
